requirement: Product is individual-first Personal AI Companion; team/exec intelligence is a by-product surface, never the individual pitch
Wedge is Engineering: connectors exist for Claude Code (local/OTel), Cursor, GitHub Copilot, plus Anthropic Console and OpenAI admin APIs
The voluntary-return bet is testable: digest delivery + return-rate instrumentation exist on the founder dogfood org
Lead with discovery, never deficiency: headline copy frames 'what you haven't tried', deficiency language only inside expandable diagnostics
For individuals the 0–100 number is demoted to an expandable diagnostic; band + narrative + next step lead; numbers stay for team/exec surfaces

Honesty over completeness: ratio components omitted when a side is missing; no signal → no row; directional claims need ≥2 corroborating signals; every inferred number carries a measured/modeled/directional/not_measured confidence tier
Privacy enforced at the data layer such that individual data structurally cannot reach a manager (not a UI/policy toggle)
One recommendation engine with tiered outputs (personal / team / exec) — never three engines
Content is data, logic is code: catalog grows by reviewed PRs inserting human-written rows; evaluator is a closed vocabulary of comparators; no LLM selects or generates guidance (G6)
Daily value decoupled from daily data: fresh content daily is fine; never a streak nag or same-day-score promise (recompute anchors previous UTC day)
Prose is a claim surface: every product claim in copy/legal/spec fact-checked against code by a non-author reviewer before shipping
Evolve, don't rewrite: every V4 capability specified as an extension of a named existing module wherever one exists
A member of a multi-person Team org receives their own personal self-view (Companion) — closing the org-of-one-only branch in the dashboard; gated on the sub-case-C ADR (§9.4)
Onboarding inverted: companion pitch before connect step in the onboarding wizard
Aha moment: after first sync the Growth Journey shows maturity level (Dormant/Trial/Adopted/Embedded/Amplified) + one next step — never 'Score 74'
Weekly digest is the habit channel: personal-best detection (strict isNewBest), gated recommendations, staleness honesty, RFC-8058 one-click unsubscribe
Daily value = a single fresh nudge card drawn from the last sync — never a data-freshness requirement
Digest and in-app Growth Journey reuse the same content assembly (deriveAttention in src/lib/score-insights.ts; digest-content.ts is a caller)
Manager onboarding: invite-by-link; cold-start honesty renders 'not enough data yet — invite N more' (EmptyState), never a falsely-low chart
Executive surface: 8 board numbers with confidence tiers, QoQ trajectory with honest notComparable, plateau detection, MATURITY_NOT_SCORED refusal list
Monthly Executive narrative one-pager (memo, not chart wall) as export and email
metric_records natural upsert key (org_id, subject_id, metric_key, day, dim); writes are ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE; org_id in PK
subject_day_signals: 24-slot UTC-hour histogram + peak_concurrency; NULL when vendor lacks intra-day grain (absence never fabricated)
29 canonical metric keys across 11 families in src/contracts/metrics.ts mirrored by seeded metric_catalog table (grown from 26/10 via ADRs — agentic, markers)
Attribution ladder person > key_project > account; derived values inherit the LOWEST attribution of inputs (lowestAttribution)
7 honesty-gap kinds are first-class connector output collected in connector_runs.gaps and surfaced in-product
Identity: subjects ↔ people via identities; auto-resolution only for person-kind subjects with unambiguous email; else manual /reconcile
tracked_user = identity-resolved person with ≥1 metric_record in period; unresolved subjects surfaced, never billed
Three data channels: vendor API connectors (team/billable), Claude Code Manual Sync (individual-plan users), and a Claude Code OTel receiver (measured accept/reject + active time)
Wire remaining polled-but-unused vendor fields into metric_records (zero new privacy surface)
Acceptance patterns: keep native Cursor/Copilot fields; NEVER label a local-log proxy as 'accept rate'; true accept/reject arrives only via OTel
Workflow diversity (feature_used dim breadth) promoted to a first-class signal
Context-usage signal (context_window etc.) OTel-gated, directional, subject to the ≥2-signal rule before driving a rec
Planning-behaviour signal: no honest source today; Future, OTel-gated (must NOT exist yet)
Conversation-structure signal: Future, needs §16 design answer first (must NOT exist beyond session-shape stats)
Deliberate field drops stay dropped without their own ADR: Copilot ai_adoption_phase; Cursor acceptedLinesAdded/Deleted, totalApplies, plan-mix fields
Per-person signal-coverage indicator distinguishing 3-source from 1-source people; rec engine must not silently recommend less to under-instrumented people
Kills: no 'true accept/reject' claims from local-log proxies; no always-on resident collector; no 'time saved' telemetry category
Roles entity: real FK target for catalog applicable_roles; engineering-only values at launch; ships before any role-specific content
Recommendation catalog as seeded versioned reference table (metric-catalog precedent) with §8.2 metadata columns
Rec interaction state: snooze/dismiss/mark-as-tried per (org, person, rec); self-view-only
Outcomes entity stays Future/demand-gated; bounded to rec engagement + next-period signal movement; must NOT ship hollow (verify absent)

recommendation_exposure log per (org,person,rec,surface,day): org-scoped, self-view-only, no manager/admin read route, never on team view, purge-registered before people, idempotent per day; deterministic holdout/variant assignment with empty registry at launch

Capability graph: domains/capabilities/capability_signals/capability_dependencies as seeded GLOBAL reference tables; 9 outcome-named engineering capabilities bound only to already-ingested signals; shallow acyclic DAG; relational, not a graph DB; recommendation_catalog.target_capabilities additive column linking all 7 recs

user_capability_state per (org,person,capability): mastery/confidence/staleness/next/jsonb breakdown; self-view-only, three registrations, purged before people; parallel reducer in poller score-recompute with org-batched reads; renders directional unless ≥2 corroborating OTel markers make it measured; zero evidence → no row

Missions: missions/mission_steps global reference (3 starters) + mission_progress org-scoped self-view; opt-in start route is the ONLY write; completion detected by capability-state reducer on measured mastery crossings (isMissionComplete), never a click; no XP/streak/league/points column or copy (schema-shape + banned-phrasing tests)
Scoring engine honesty verified: ratio-side missing → component omitted; nothing consumed → null, no row written (src/scoring/evaluate.ts)
Three global presets (adoption/fluency/efficiency) stay, published in score-definitions.md
Individual surface: raw 0–100 behind an expander; person sees band + narrative + next step
A single blended individual 'AI Health' number is killed — must not exist anywhere
Marker-level proficiency breakdown (self-view), capped directional until the OTel receiver provides measured markers
Maturity model is the Team+Exec pillar and gets distribution (export, email) rather than redesign

Benchmarks are three distinct claim lanes (own past self / org peers aggregate-only / outside world) never blurred; external norms stay draft-labeled 'Revealyst modeled estimate (unverified)' until founder-verified; cross-org k-anonymous gated on consent volume
Insight taxonomy named and consistent (data-hygiene/adoption/effectiveness/spend/agentic-transition/early-warning/narrative/milestone) with the milestone/positive kind added
No fixed personality label shown to an individual (segmentFor vocabulary); segments survive only as aggregate cohort lens for managers

Catalog rows (title, body, applicableRoles, applicableTools, requiredSignals, benefit, difficulty, confidence, resources, signalGroup, taxonomy kind, action type) live in a seeded versioned reference table; growing it is a reviewed PR
Evaluator stays a closed vocabulary over measured facts; requiredSignals structured from that vocabulary; no LLM in selection or generation
Catalog perf floor: ONE per-org catalog read + in-memory per-person evaluation; never N per-person round trips

Deterministic computeUtility replaces fixed impact:1 — named exported weights (0.35 capabilityGap + 0.20 benefit + 0.15 confidence + 0.10 roleToolFit + 0.10 novelty − 0.05 difficulty − fatigue); no ML/LLM; output-equivalence guard proves uniform metadata reduces to weakest-first; cap + signalGroup dedupe unchanged
Stage-1 eligibility filter: role/tool applicability + capability-prerequisite gate that fails closed (missing state = not mastered), applied consistently to dashboard and digest
Each surfaced rec carries a computed 'why this' line derived from the dominant utility term (cannot drift from ranking) and an honest confidence disclosure ('Based on N connected sources')
Digest and dashboard provably share the same rec source: a shared-source test asserts identical selection + order
Suggested-action taxonomy is exactly link-out-doc / in-product-setting / deep-link-to-vendor-settings; no 'Revealyst does X for you' copy (no third-party write automation)
Rec interaction state wired into coaching UI: snooze/dismiss/mark-as-tried; managers never see individual interaction state
Growth Journey card assembles maturity level + one next step + why + benefit from shipped outputs; no new storage for v0; never a third ladder (org matures, person progresses — only two scales)
Milestone catalog (first agent session, breadth threshold, N-week cadence) surfaced immediately in-app, not digest-only; extends isNewBest plumbing
'No daily streak' decision recorded: weekly consistency with forgiveness narrative, or none
'Next best thing to learn' as ONE persistent card (not regenerated daily), riding catalog + rec interaction state
Capability profile card: positive-first decomposition of the ONE proficiency band (never a third ladder), self-view, backed by user_capability_state
Missions rendered as opt-in MissionCard (Start → 'N of M steps reached' → grounded completion)
Learning-path content: static curricula keyed to band, merged with learning goals into one content model sequencing the catalog
Duolingo values-only: clear level, one next step, visible progress, milestone recognition — but NO streak flames, XP, leagues, hearts
Extend existing self-view machinery (PersonalSelfView + digest personal lane) to every person inside or outside a team — not a parallel system

assertTeamOnlyPseudonymized throws if a surfaced score carries a real name, a segment lists members, or a shared-account flag exposes an account identifier; completeness is test-enforced (surface registry)
orgs.visibilityMode 'private' stays the permanent default; individual recs stay invisible to managers even when name visibility is loosened
Champion/blocker surfacing has a MIN_PEOPLE floor before naming an implicit champion in a small team

Capability coverage: count-only aggregate rollup per capability in team Training-opportunities section; MIN_PEOPLE-floored with below-floor capabilities dropped entirely; row prop type carries no person id/name; exec-memo coverage line via composeExecReport
Shared accounts: guidance-first migration path; detection flags aggregate-only; count resolved identities only; unresolved surfaced never billed

Sub-case-C ADR prerequisites: (a) provable exclusion audit predicate with test-enforced completeness, (b) dual-source dedup (admin-API + local agent person never double-counts), (c) surfaced-not-billed; Companion cannot ship inside Team orgs until the ADR exists

Manual Sync kept as the MVP data path: @revealyst/agent two-command copy-paste, streaming parser, window pinning, post-commit recompute enqueue, SyncStatusBadge + staleness banner at 14 days, sync_window_incomplete honesty gap
Companion daily content draws on the last sync; data freshness honestly badged; never a daily sync nag
Same-click sync reward from already-computed data ('this sync captured N sessions across M days — here's one thing you did well')
Inline 'what this sync sends' transparency panel after every sync: event/day counts + allowlisted field names derived from the device allowlist
The two sync mental models (one-click connector poll vs run-a-CLI-command) separated in copy on /connections
Never a drag-and-drop log upload flow; never a browser-persistent-grant sync
Resident/cadence-aware agent demoted not dead; go/no-go decided by last_success_at cadence telemetry
Personal Companion surface: Growth Journey card + persistent coaching card + daily nudge card (one card, not a dashboard) replaces score-first PersonalSelfView layout
Optimization metadata on recs (impact/difficulty/confidence/action type) as a type extension of the static map (G6-compliant)
Team Intelligence consolidation: ~17 panels fold into ~5 cards; Exec 8-number report gets distribution
Budget-threshold EMAIL alerts riding the SES sender (in-app alerts already shipped)
Within-org percentile lens + board-ready CSV export (percentile() from usage-distribution, not the external-benchmark lane)
Digest extended as the Growth-Journey delivery vehicle (digest-content.ts extension)
Claude Code OTel receiver: OTLP POST /v1/metrics + /v1/logs reusing the agent device-token scheme; pure decoder tested against real captured fixtures; content flags off / scrubbing
Renewal reminders: manually-entered contract dates honestly labeled unverifiable; T-30/T-7 emails; CAS state
No per-user LLM-generated coaching text anywhere
No browser extension, desktop proxy, or capture beyond sanctioned connectors/agent/OTel
No prompt-content ingestion in Team mode, ever
No time-saved / ROI-% / AI-helps-hurts verdicts; expected impact renders qualitative or adoption-based, never hours/dollars
No per-person quality, velocity, or AI-vs-human authorship scores
No shadow-AI estimation — state the gap, never model it (darkSeat: not_measured pattern)
No manager visibility into any individual recommendation, coaching content, or interaction state (code-enforced)
No formula DSL / per-tenant custom scoring expressions; Custom Index Builder stays closed-vocabulary, never person-level
No enterprise procurement machinery (SSO/SAML/SCIM, MDM, HRIS sync) without a first Enterprise customer
No DORA/dev-intelligence suite; no GitHub outcome layer without its own ADR + DPA review
No 'AI news' editorial feed
No third-party write automation ('Revealyst does X for you' in someone else's tool)
No 'Ask AI' NL-query chat surface
No second B2C funnel for Personal mode (org-of-one architecture stands)
No non-engineering role libraries in MVP or V1
No Slack/Teams delivery channel in MVP/V1 (email first)
No literal Duolingo mechanics: streaks without forgiveness, XP, leagues, hearts
No Kafka / ClickHouse / separate ML service / Chinese-vendor connectors

Pricing unchanged: $0 Personal forever, $2/tracked-user/mo Team, free band ≤5 (FREE_TRACKED_USER_LIMIT single source of truth), Paddle MoR
Seat metering correctness: compare-and-set quantity in Postgres BEFORE Paddle PATCH; record-then-charge; never double-charge
Free-band paywall gates BOTH page shell and JSON APIs (handleApi 402 default; allowOverFreeBand opt-out only for upgrade/portal)
Three audience-scoped surfaces (Personal Companion / Team Intelligence / Executive one-pager); everything else is a card, a settings page, or gone

Fold the thin /people and /teams rosters into Team Intelligence + Settings
Kill standalone correlation/anomaly panels (synthesis stays inside the narrative)
Demote /indexes (Custom Index Builder) out of navigation prominence
Honest empty and degraded states everywhere: EmptyState, staleness banners, notComparable patterns; cold-start team sees 'invite N more'
Positive-first framing in every headline string; deficiency language only inside expandable diagnostics
Design system unchanged: Tailwind v4 + shadcn base-nova on Base UI primitives; shared components in src/components; pages get session + org scope only via src/lib/api-context.ts
Copy discipline: user-facing prose in glossary-style constant modules (*-glossary.ts, *-copy.ts); connector claims derive from src/connectors/registry.ts, never hard-coded

'No prompt content. Ever.' enforced at three independent points: (1) on-device allowlist parser never reads denylisted fields; (2) server-side MAX_DIM_LENGTH=128 + control-character rejection; (3) OTel receiver content-flags-off + scrubbing
Team-mode privacy is self-view-only by legal analysis (EDPB 05/2020, BetrVG §87): no manager-readable surface for individual data

Self-view-only enforced by audit predicate (assertTeamOnlyPseudonymized), generalized + completeness-test-enforced; named reveal gated behind explicit logged admin action (orgs.visibilityMode + audit_log)
Credentials: AES-256-GCM envelope, versioned Worker-secret KEK, AAD binds orgId:connectionId:kind; no plaintext credential column; never claim 'KMS' in any copy
Retention/deletion: raw payloads purged ~90d; account deletion purges via CI-enforced completeness tripwire; every new person-scoped table registers into the sweep on day one
Public inspectable 'what we collect' schema page generated from the actual device allowlist (not a paraphrase)
Opt-in rate instrumented as a leading indicator ('privacy enables adoption' as a measured hypothesis)
Kills: no Team-org design where person-level desktop/OTel data reaches a manager-visible surface; no org-deployed endpoint agents/MDM; no raw log/folder upload
MVP exit gate measurable: sustained N-week weekly-digest open/return rate on the founder dogfood org (default 6 weeks) instrumented before Team-tier investment
Voluntary-return instrumentation: digest open → in-app session rate; Companion-surface revisit rate
Habit instrumentation: manual-sync cadence distribution derived from append-only connector_runs history; connections.last_success_at as latest-sync timestamp
Opt-in rate for the self-view companion in Team orgs (measured; gated with W6-A)
Rec engagement: shown → tried/dismissed ratio (needs interaction state + exposure log)
Honesty-gap trend: % usage person-attributed per org over time, surfaced in-product
Flywheel conversion observable: individual orgs → invites sent → team orgs created from existing invite tables

Topology unchanged: one Cloudflare Worker (OpenNext, custom src/worker.ts), two custom domains split via src/lib/domains.ts, Neon via Hyperdrive + Drizzle, Cron→Queues with DLQ, Better Auth (cookie cache off), Paddle MoR, SES, single DB with org_id everywhere, Personal = org of one
Perf model binding: new read surfaces thread onto an existing single flat Promise.all (readDashboardView pattern), never a new sequential query stage; Smart Placement stays OFF

Three-registration law: every net-new org-scoped table ships in the same PR with (1) an ADR, (2) a tenant-isolation SCOPED_READS entry with non-vacuous B-org seed, (3) an account-deletion registration

All access via forOrg (src/db/org-scope.ts); cross-org reads only in src/db/system.ts from cron/queue paths; new API routes typed in src/contracts/api.ts and served through handleApi/appContext with the 402 gate by default
